## Research Objective
*What specific question needs to be answered?*

## Expected Deliverables
- [ ] Market analysis document
- [ ] Competitive intelligence
- [ ] Consumer insights
- [ ] Technical assessment
- [ ] AI-structured data

## Priority Level
- [ ] Critical (blocks major decisions)
- [ ] High (affects strategy)
- [ ] Medium (nice to have)

## Timeline
*When is this needed?*

## Dependencies
*What other research/documents does this depend on?*

## AI Integration Requirements
*How should this be structured for AI consumption?*
